title: Short outings: Little Gaddesden christening & Malvern

excursions.label: Day trip to Little Gaddesden christening (Charlotte Maxwell)

stops.excerpt: The Christening was at Little Gaddesden, + the reception/lunch was at Mrs. della Casa's house.

excursions.label: Day trip to Malvern to meet Boyle, Urbanchick and the Hills

stops.excerpt: Simon, Eve, Thomas, Charles (chickenpox) went over to Malvern for Thomas to meet Boyle + Urbanchick, + all to meet the Hills.

boundary_flags: Page A_0060_L has mixed_start=true; the opening lines ('Welshpool. We drove on home...') belong to the preceding trip and are excluded from this route.
summary: Two separate day outings from Birmingham in May-June 1992: on 31 May, Jill and Kate Warburton attended Charlotte Maxwell's christening at Little Gaddesden, Hertfordshire, with John also joining briefly; on 9 June, Simon, Eve, Thomas and Charles (recovering from chickenpox) drove to Malvern to meet friends Boyle, Urbanchick and the Hills. Both trips were home-and-back in a single day with no overnight stays.
extraction_notes: This bundle covers two unrelated one-day outings recorded on a single diary page (A_0060_L). The main route is trivially home→home; both visits are modelled as excursions from Birmingham. 'Jill' (outing 1) is not in the standard family list and may be a family friend or relative; she is omitted from the travellers array pending clarification. 'John' is listed in the travellers array as he is a family member explicitly mentioned arriving. The Welshpool sentence at the top of the page is the tail of the preceding Dinas/Wales trip (boundary_mixed=true) and is excluded. No crossings or overnight bases; no unresolved place names.
